hypothesis: Augmenting the autonomous framework with a persistent semantic-episodic memory that records validated structure–property heuristics and task experiences will enable zero-shot generalization to unseen porous-material classes (e.g., MOFs and COFs) and new adsorbates, such that the system achieves at least 85% correctness in force-field extraction and 90% executable simulation setups on these unseen classes, with reproducibility comparable to in-class tasks.
